audit_causation: Every transition audit event references the authenticated request_envelope_id; the writer component is never treated as the requester.

proposed: origin, acceptance criteria, immutable scope, requester, deadline, and requested authority are present
active: authority snapshot and policy context are current
suspended: resume checkpoint is immutable and current
blocked: blocked_from_state is one of proposed, active, verifying, or terminating
block reason and unblock condition are explicit
terminating: new execution and verification intents are forbidden

blocked_from_state.rule: set atomically when entering blocked and cleared atomically only when resuming to the same recorded state or entering terminating

absent_in: blocked when blocked_from_state is not terminating
termination_disposition.rule: set before or atomically with entry to terminating; immutable thereafter; retained while blocked_from_state is terminating; terminal target must equal the disposition

related_intent_purposes_semantics: Transition metadata only identifies pre-existing or causal intent purposes whose terminal evidence may support the Goal transition. It never authorizes intent creation; intent-purpose-guards.json#goal_state_matrix is the sole creation authorization.

rules.description: authenticated actor and immutable scope match request causation
unknown origin, scope, actor, or acceptance is denied

approval.description: all activation approvals required by risk policy are current, scoped, unconsumed, and do not replace authority

rules.description: authenticated actor and immutable scope match
origin and acceptance criteria are valid

quiescence.description: not_required; no action intent may exist for a proposed goal

deadline.description: goal deadline must be present and unexpired

timeout.description: remain proposed and deny activation

cancellation.description: a concurrent discard wins only if committed first; otherwise cancellation requires a later terminating transition

crash_recovery.description: atomic rollback before commit; committed active state plus audit is authoritative after commit

reconciliation.description: repair is prohibited; missing atomic audit causes startup not-ready and incident resolution

approval.description: not required

rules.description: documented block reason and machine-readable unblock condition exist

quiescence.description: not_required; proposed goals cannot own action intents or claims

deadline.description: transition request has a bounded processing deadline

timeout.description: remain proposed and raise guardian signal

cancellation.description: discard may be requested independently

crash_recovery.description: rollback before commit; restore blocked state and blocked_from_state together after commit

reconciliation.description: reject blocked rows without blocked_from_state and keep service not-ready

approval.description: required only when retention or governance policy requires accountable approval

rules.description: goal has never authorized an external effect

quiescence.description: required and must evaluate true atomically

deadline.description: transition request has a bounded processing deadline

timeout.description: remain proposed

cancellation.description: this is the cancellation path for a proposed goal

crash_recovery.description: rollback before commit; terminal state and audit are authoritative after commit

reconciliation.description: terminal state without audit or quiescence evidence is a release stop

approval.description: required only by the goal risk contract

quiescence.description: required and must evaluate true atomically

operations.description: bind an existing immutable checkpoint reference previously created by the Memory Transition Gate

deadline.description: suspension workflow has a bounded deadline

timeout.description: remain active or enter blocked through goal.block_active; never report suspended

cancellation.description: open cancellation work prevents quiescence and suspension

crash_recovery.description: Memory Transition Gate has already committed immutable checkpoint content; Goal Transition Gate transaction binds only checkpoint id and digest with goal state and audit, and never creates or mutates checkpoint content

reconciliation.description: validate checkpoint freshness and absence of open work before ready

approval.description: not required

rules.description: block reason and unblock condition exist

quiescence.description: not_required; open work remains governed and cannot be silently released

deadline.description: immediate for guardian safety blocks; otherwise bounded

timeout.description: guardian escalates while goal remains active; kill-switch rules still apply

cancellation.description: cancellation may continue under the blocked-state purpose matrix

crash_recovery.description: rollback before commit; state and blocked_from_state commit together

reconciliation.description: preserve every open claim and possible effect while blocked

approval.description: not required unless the verification operation separately requires it

rules.description: acceptance criteria are machine-readable and immutable
ready_for_verification is true: every non-verification intent is terminal, no possible effect or reconciliation is open, and all required execution evidence is frozen

quiescence.description: not_required; verification intents may be created only after entry

deadline.description: verification deadline is bounded by the goal deadline

timeout.description: transition to blocked through goal.block_verifying with timeout evidence

cancellation.description: cancellation transitions the goal to terminating with disposition failed or discarded

crash_recovery.description: rollback before commit; frozen inputs, state, and audit commit together

reconciliation.description: verify frozen evidence references and verifier separation before resuming

approval.description: required by risk policy except an emergency guardian stop; approval never creates authority

quiescence.description: not_required; terminating exists to obtain quiescence safely

deadline.description: termination has an explicit deadline no later than the goal deadline unless emergency policy shortens it

timeout.description: enter blocked through goal.block_terminating and escalate; do not force a terminal state

cancellation.description: launch only purpose=cancellation intents allowed by the guard matrix

crash_recovery.description: rollback before commit; disposition, state, and audit commit together

reconciliation.description: resume cancellation, reconciliation, or compensation without changing disposition

approval.description: required when the original or current risk contract requires renewed approval

rules.description: authority, policy, approval, budget, and compliance evidence are revalidated

quiescence.description: source state must still satisfy quiescence at commit

deadline.description: goal deadline must remain unexpired

timeout.description: remain suspended

cancellation.description: termination may be requested instead

crash_recovery.description: rollback before commit; committed active state is resumed exactly once

reconciliation.description: stale checkpoints deny resume and require a new authorized checkpoint decision
